snippet.title: Baylor wins the 2021 NCAA basketball championship | extended highlights
snippet.description:
Baylor dominated from wire to wire to defeat Gonzaga and win the 2021 National Championship! The Bears won their first title in program history behind 22 points from Jared Butler and 19 from MaCio Teague. Watch the extended highlights here.

Watch highlights, game recaps, and much more from the 2021 NCAA Division I MenŌĆÖs Basketball Tournament on the official NCAA March Madness YouTube channel. Subscribe now to be updated on the latest videos: http://www.youtube.com/marchmadness?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Japan sends destroyer to track China's Liaoning aircraft | Okinawa islands | Latest English News
snippet.description:
Japan deploys destroyer to gather information after Chinese carrier group spotted in Okinawa and Miyako islands towards the Pacific, Japan has sent its destroyer in retaliation.

#JapanDestroyer #ChinaLiaoningAircraft #OkianawaIslands

About Channel: 

WION -The World is One News, examines global issues with in-depth analysis. We provide much more than the news of the day. Our aim to empower people to explore their world. With our Global headquarters in New Delhi, we bring you news on the hour, by the hour. We deliver information that is not biased. We are journalists who are neutral to the core and non-partisan when it comes to the politics of the world. People are tired of biased reportage and we stand for a globalised united world. So for us the World is truly One.
 
Please keep discussions on this channel clean and respectful and refrain from using racist or sexist slurs as well as personal insults.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItŌĆÖs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItŌĆÖs a vicious cycle.

┘Ć┘Ć┘Ć┘Ć┘Ć

snippet.title: GRAB DRIVER AT OWNER NG LUGAW PILIPINAS, NAGSALITA!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

2:54 - SHIP HAPPENS 
Pencilmate wants to ship a package to Pencilmiss. Will it get there? 

6:34 - WHAT A CALL 
Pencilmate's waiting for a text back! How can Pencilmiss text so SLOW?!

9:34 - FRY SO SERIOUS?
Have we also mentioned that these burgeres are locally sourced, and completely greenhouse gas friendly? Pencilmate's the ULTIMATE FRY Cook!

12:51 - PRIMP MY RIDE 
Pencilmiss overslept her date! Will she get ready on time?!

15:18 - FAILURE TO LUNCH
Pencilmate has the longest sandwich ever! 

17:36 - BE FAIRY FAIRY QUIET
Mini Mate loses a tooth! With he finally get to meet the toothfairy? 

21:06 - TAG REFLEX
Pencilmate and Mini Mate play tag but... Mini Mate GOES MISSING?!

24:59 - IN PLANE SIGHT 
Pencilmate tries to fly a toy plane! How far will he get?

28:05 - REMOTE CONTROLLED
Pencilmate finds the best remote! Until Mini Mate gets his hands on it.

Is Pencilmate Smarter than a BABY? -in- "You Thumb Drive Me Crazy"| Pencilmation

ABOUT PENCILMATION :
Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

snippet.title: Gonzaga vs. UCLA - Final Four NCAA tournament extended highlights
snippet.description:
Gonzaga held on in the final seconds of overtime after a clutch three-point buzzer-beating bucket by Jalen Suggs to send the Bulldogs to the National Championship Game. The Zags had all five starters in double-figures, led by Drew Timme with 25 points and Joel Ayayi with 22 points and 6 boards. Watch the full game highlights.


Watch highlights, game recaps, and much more from the 2021 NCAA Division I MenŌĆÖs Basketball Tournament on the official NCAA March Madness YouTube channel. Subscribe now to be updated on the latest videos: http://www.youtube.com/marchmadness?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Journey To The Forbidden Valley | Full Family Adventure Bigfoot Movie
snippet.description:
A boy and his guardian encounter the mysterious Yeren-- an elusive ape-man creature.
Subscribe ­¤æē http://bit.ly/SubToFamCentral | More Free Movies ­¤æēhttp://bit.ly/FamlyMovies
**This film is under non-exclusive license from ITN Distribution. All rights reserved**

Year Released : 2017
Director: Ethan Wiley
Writers: Chris Walas (co-writer) | Ethan Wiley (co-writer)
Stars: Sasha Jackson | Douglas Tait | Erroll Shand

After a small airplane crash lands in a remote area of Central China, several passengers survive, including a Chinese boy and his American guardian. As they wait to be rescued, they soon encounter the mysterious Yeren-- an elusive ape-man creature rumored to have inhabited the Shennongjia mountains for many centuries. When ruthless poachers arrive to capture the Yeren, our heroes must decide if the unique creature is their friend or foe.

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryŌĆÖs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenŌĆÖs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for ŌĆ£You All Over MeŌĆØ (Feat. Maren Morris) (TaylorŌĆÖs Version) [From The Vault] ŌĆō off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorŌĆÖs Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
Ō¢║Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

Ō¢║Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
Ō¢║Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
Ō¢║Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ŌĆśem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IŌĆÖve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ŌĆśdon't you wish you had meŌĆÖ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IŌĆÖve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
IŌĆÖve still got you all over me
IŌĆÖve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: Kotse, nahulog mula sa tulay na walang harang at warning sign sa CamSur; 4, patay | 24 Oras Weekend
snippet.description:
Patay ang apat na katao matapos mahulog ang sinasakyan nilang kotse mula sa tulay na walang harang at warning sign sa Ragay, Camarines Sur.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Jam! LeBron James, NBA champion and global icon, goes on an epic adventure alongside Bugs Bunny and his looney friends.
 
When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youŌĆÖve never seen them before. ItŌĆÖs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronŌĆÖs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself.
 
Available in theaters and to stream on HBO Max on July 16, in the US only, for 31 days from theatrical release, at no extra cost to subscribers.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMediaŌĆÖs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaŌĆÖs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

HOSHI, member of the self-producing idol group, SEVENTEEN, reveals his first solo mixtape. The leader of SEVENTEENŌĆÖs performance unit, HOSHI is not only a well-rounded performer with distinguished vocal and rap ability, but is also credited with choreographing various SEVENTEEN tracks throughout his career. Through HOSHI Mixtape Spider, HOSHI establishes himself as a choreographer, lyricist, and songwriter, showcasing his creative independence and growth as the artist ŌĆ£HOSHIŌĆØ.

In ŌĆ£Spider,ŌĆØ HOSHI likens the feelings of falling for the deadly and inescapable charms of an individual to the desperate movements of a prey caught in a spiderŌĆÖs web. The accompanying music video and choreography visualize the state of being ŌĆ£trappedŌĆØ and unable to escape from this maze-like dynamic. HOSHIŌĆÖs sentimental vocals are backed by dreamlike pluck sounds and a restrained bassline, further heightening the tension in this thrilling game of spider and prey.

#HOSHI #ĒśĖņŗ£
#Spider #ņŖżĒīīņØ┤ļŹö

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube Ō¢║ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

en-GB.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube Ō¢║ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

snippet.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
snippet.description:
ŌĆ£SanaŌĆÖy di nalang kita nakilala, sanaŌĆÖy di nalang kita nakasama..ŌĆØ ­¤ī¢Ō£©­¤īŖ

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesnŌĆÖt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng ŌĆ£SanaŌĆÖy di nalangŌĆØ ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

snippet.title: COVID IN OUR HOME | GARY VALENCIANO
snippet.description:
Hey everyone. HereŌĆÖs a little update about the news that came out regarding my wife. 
She is positive and I am negative. 
Thank you for all your prayers. 
I will skip any bike vlogs for this week as I think this is more important. 
LetŌĆÖs keep praying for our countrymen...especially those who have the virus but have no one with them and very little finances to sustain themselves through this. God bless us all.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Binibining Pilipinas inuudyukan na HUWAG NANG MAGPADALA ng Kandidata sa Miss Grand International
snippet.description: Malinaw ang sigaw ng sambayanang Pilipino sa Binibining Pilipinas Charities Incorporated at kay Madam Stella Araneta na itigil na ang pagpapadala ng ating mga kandidata sa Miss Grand International. Dahil sa ilang beses na umano tayong nananakawan ng korona sa nasabing Beauty Pageant ng Thailand, kagaya ni Samantha Bernardo at Nicole Cordovez, mas mabuti daw na wag nalang tayong magsayang ng panibagong binibini. May nagsasabi na kahit kailan daw ay hindi maaapreciate ng MGI Organization ang galing at talino ng mga kandidatang ipinanlalaban ng Pilipinas dahil bitter daw ang mga ito sa tagumpay ng ating bansa sa larangan ng Beauty Pageant. Pilipinas kase ang katangi-tanging bansa sa Southeast Asia na itinuturing na Power House. Pinas din ang pangalawa sa pinakamaraming  koronang naipanalo sa Big 4 Beauty Pageant.
